title: Build analytics aggregate API returning store-wide metrics
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/admin/analytics resolves authenticated store from session cookie (returns 401 if invalid)
Returns total_engagements: count of AnalyticsEvent rows where event IN (quiz_started, question_answered)
Returns total_completions: count of AnalyticsEvent rows where event = quiz_completed
Returns conversion_rate: total_completions / total_engagements as percentage (0 if no engagements)
Returns total_revenue: sum of OrderAttribution.orderTotal for the store
Returns aov (average order value): total_revenue / count of OrderAttribution rows (0 if no orders)
Returns quiz_count: total published quizzes for the store
Returns submission_count: total Submission rows for the store
Supports optional ?from and ?to query params (ISO dates) to filter by date range
Response shape: { storeId, period: { from, to }, metrics: { ... }, computedAt }
Follows existing resolveStore pattern from quizzes/route.ts for session auth
All Prisma queries scoped to storeId
